title: Shankarpally Growth Corridor
subtitle: Premium Mixed-Use Land — HMDA Approved
description: Nestled within the premium growth corridor of Eastern Hyderabad, this 12.4-acre parcel offers rare flexibility — suited for residential development, commercial expansion, warehouse logistics, or agricultural leasing. The property is freehold, clear-title, and fully approved under HMDA jurisdiction.
description2: Surrounded by IT parks, arterial roads, and upcoming metro connectivity, this is not merely land — it is a strategic position in one of India's fastest-appreciating urban corridors.
features: HMDA & RERA Approved — full regulatory compliance
Four-lane access road with dedicated entry points
Underground electrical grid installed across perimeter
Bore wells + HMWSSB municipal water connection
Perimeter compound wall with CCTV surveillance
Metro Phase III station within 1.2 km (2026 target)

proximity.title: IT Corridor
proximity.detail: HITEC City & Financial District — 18 km. Upcoming SEZ within 5 km radius.

proximity.title: Airport
proximity.detail: Rajiv Gandhi International Airport — 22 km via ORR, under 30 minutes.

proximity.title: Metro Phase III
proximity.detail: Proposed station at 1.2 km — expected operational 2026 Q3.

proximity.title: Social Infrastructure
proximity.detail: 3 international schools, 2 hospitals, premium malls within 8 km.

proximity.title: ORR Connectivity
proximity.detail: Direct access to Outer Ring Road — 4 km. Full city connectivity.

reasons.title: Metro Effect
reasons.text: Properties within 2 km of metro stations have appreciated 180–220% in comparable Hyderabad corridors. Phase III arrival locks in a 3–5 year appreciation window.

reasons.title: Supply Scarcity
reasons.text: Only 11 parcels of 10+ acres with freehold title remain in this micro-market. No new supply pipeline. Scarcity is the fundamental driver of premium land value.

reasons.title: Mixed-Use Flexibility
reasons.text: The mixed-use zoning enables residential, commercial, or warehouse development without conversion delays. Four viable strategies mean your exit options are never constrained.

reasons.title: Zero Legal Risk
reasons.text: Legal due diligence completed — EC dating back 60 years, mutation records clear, no litigation, no attachment orders. You invest with verified certainty.

reasons.title: Institutional Interest
reasons.text: Two Tier-1 developers and a Singapore-based REIT have already expressed acquisition interest. Institutional demand signals are the most reliable indicator of future valuation.

reviews.text: After a thorough examination of the title chain spanning six decades, I confirm this property is entirely free from encumbrances, litigation, or disputed ownership. The survey, EC, and mutation records are in impeccable order.
reviews.role: Senior Advocate, Hyderabad High Court — 28 years in property law

reviews.text: This property qualifies for up to 70% LTV financing through our institutional lending program. The collateral value is strong, the title is unimpeachable, and growth projections justify both construction and acquisition loan structures.
reviews.role: VP — Real Estate Finance, HDFC Bank Hyderabad

terms: Registered JDA with sub-registrar — full legal protection
Construction timeline locked by milestone schedule
Escrow account for all financial flows

title: Kokapet Financial District Plots
subtitle: Premium Villa Plots — RERA Registered
description: Strategically located adjacent to the Financial District and HITEC City, these premium villa plots offer the rarest opportunity in Hyderabad's most coveted address. Fully demarcated, RERA-registered, and ready for immediate construction.
description2: With frontage on the 100-ft road and panoramic views of the Financial District skyline, these plots are favoured by HNIs, NRIs, and institutional investors alike.
features: Smart home pre-wiring in all plots

proximity.title: Financial District
proximity.detail: Direct adjacency — 0.8 km to Goldman Sachs, Deloitte & KPMG campuses.

proximity.title: Lulu Mall
proximity.detail: 2.5 km — Hyderabad's largest retail and entertainment destination.

proximity.title: International Schools
proximity.detail: Oakridge & Chirec International Schools within 3 km radius.

proximity.title: Healthcare
proximity.detail: AIG, Care & Medicover Hospitals — all within 5 km.

proximity.title: ORR Junction
proximity.detail: Nearest ORR exit — 1.2 km. Airport reach: 25 minutes.

reasons.title: Zero-to-Build Ready
reasons.text: Fully demarcated plots with all approvals in place. No waiting period — break ground from day one with zero regulatory friction.

reasons.title: Address Premium
reasons.text: Kokapet–Financial District is Hyderabad's fastest appreciating micro-market. The address itself commands a premium resale multiplier.

reasons.title: NRI Demand Surge
reasons.text: Over 62% of recent transactions in this corridor are NRI-driven. Dollar-denominated buyers are creating sustained price support.

reasons.title: Amenity Advantage
reasons.text: Clubhouse, pool, gym, and landscaping already built. These are not promises — they are delivered assets that immediately justify premium pricing.

reasons.title: Exit Flexibility
reasons.text: Resell as a plot, build and sell as a villa, or lease. Three distinct exit strategies protect your capital across any market cycle.

reviews.text: RERA registration and EC verification are complete. The title is clean, the layout approvals are in order, and there are no pending dues or encumbrances. I have reviewed over 200 Hyderabad properties — this is among the cleanest I've certified.
reviews.role: Property Law Specialist, Hyderabad — 22 years experience

reviews.text: Given the RERA registration, address value, and demonstrated appreciation curve, we are comfortable offering up to 75% LTV. This is the most competitive financing we offer for any plot product in Hyderabad.
reviews.role: VP Real Estate Lending, Axis Bank Hyderabad

title: Adibatla Aerospace & Industrial
subtitle: Industrial & Warehouse Land — 25 Acres
description: Adjacent to the Adibatla Aerospace & Defence SEZ — home to Boeing, Tata Advanced Systems, and DRDO — this 25-acre industrial parcel represents a once-in-a-decade opportunity to position capital in India's defence manufacturing corridor.
description2: The Government of Telangana's Industrial Policy 2025 designates this zone as priority industrial land with guaranteed power supply, dedicated water line, and road widening already sanctioned.
features: 80 ft industrial road with heavy vehicle access
Ready for aerospace, pharma, or logistics use

proximity.title: Boeing India
proximity.detail: Boeing India Pvt Ltd facility — 3.2 km direct road access.

proximity.title: Rail Freight
proximity.detail: Proposed dedicated freight corridor station — 6 km (2027).

proximity.title: ORR Access
proximity.detail: Outer Ring Road junction — 8 km, connectivity to all city nodes.

proximity.title: Power Infrastructure
proximity.detail: 33 KV dedicated substation — uninterrupted industrial supply.

reasons.title: Defence Corridor
reasons.text: The Adibatla–Fab City corridor is being positioned as India's answer to Bangalore's defence aerospace cluster. Government capex of ₹4,200 Cr committed in this zone.

reasons.title: Anchor Tenants Nearby
reasons.text: Boeing, Tata Advanced Systems, Mahindra Defence and L&T are already operational neighbours. Anchor tenants elevate lease rates and land values for adjacent parcels.

reasons.title: Industrial Policy Incentives
reasons.text: Telangana Industrial Policy 2025 provides tax incentives, power subsidies, and fast-track clearances specifically for this zone.

reasons.title: Rail + Road + Air
reasons.text: Tri-modal logistics connectivity — ORR road, upcoming freight rail, and proximity to cargo terminal at RGIA. No other parcel in this range offers this stack.

reasons.title: Lease Yield
reasons.text: Industrial lease yields in adjacent TSIIC zones are running at 9–12% annually — among the strongest in any asset class in Telangana.

reviews.text: TSIIC clearance has been verified and the title is clean. Industrial zoning is confirmed and there are no pending litigation matters. This is among the best-documented industrial parcels I've reviewed.

Industrial land with TSIIC backing and SEZ adjacency qualifies for specialised infrastructure financing at competitive rates. We project strong LTV support given the committed government infrastructure spend in this corridor.

terms: Revenue split negotiated upfront (50:50 for industrial JDA)
Escrow account for all financial flows
